name: Dealing with Hidden Illnesses from Chemical Exposure at Work
description: Dealing with Hidden Illnesses from Chemical Exposure at Work - Murray

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Chemical exposure is tricky because symptoms often show up late. Start a "symptom diary" today detailing your cough, rashes, or dizziness. Ask your employer for the Safety Data Sheets (SDS) for every chemical you handle. Then, see a specialist who understands toxic strikes. If your boss tries to downplay the risk, call Just Work Comp Law to make sure you're protected.
